headline: Nasdaq 100 Falls 1% As 30-Year Yields Spike To 19-Year Highs: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks slip Tuesday as the 30-year yield surged to an 19-year high near 5.2% and chipmakers tumbled, while oil held above $103 on the Iran impasse.

headline: Stock Market News for May 19, 2026
summary: Wall Street closed mixed on Monday as oil prices declined following delayed U.S. strike plans on Iran.
